Module initialization, custom exceptions, PULSEv2 datagram handling, data-link layer, logging, pcap writing, PCMP, PPP, statistics, and transport protocols.


## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: Initializes the module by importing and registering transport classes for the link interface.
- **[exceptions.py](exceptions.py.md)**: Custom exception classes for handling specific errors in the Pulse2 module.
- **[framing.py](framing.py.md)**: Handles encoding and decoding of PULSEv2 datagrams with flag delimiters, transparency encoding, and FCS.
- **[link.py](link.py.md)**: Implements the PULSEv2 lower data-link layer interface for connectionless service over serial ports.
- **[logging.py](logging.py.md)**: A logging adapter that prefixes log messages with a specified tag.
- **[pcap_file.py](pcap_file.py.md)**: Writer for Libpcap capture files with threading support and packet writing functionality.
- **[pcmp.py](pcmp.py.md)**: Implements the PULSE Control Message Protocol for communication over a transport layer, including packet parsing and echo requests.
- **[ppp.py](ppp.py.md)**: Implementation of the Point-to-Point Protocol (PPP) with state machine logic for link control and packet handling.
- **[stats.py](stats.py.md)**: Calculates online statistics like count, min, max, mean, variance, and standard deviation.
- **[transports.py](transports.py.md)**: Implements various transport protocols for packet communication, including socket management and reliable data transfer.
